location: Dropped by the Black Blade Kindred — a single enemy dual-wielding a twinblade and a greataxe — on the stairway path in the Forbidden Lands, just before the Grand Lift of Rold. A guaranteed field drop alongside its partner weapon, Gargoyle's Black Axe. Not the same weapon as the Enia-remembrance Gargoyle's Twinblade, and not the similarly-named Gargoyle's Blackblade from a different Black Blade Kindred variant in Caelid.
region: Forbidden Lands (between Altus Plateau and Mountaintops of the Giants)
tactics: From the Forbidden Lands grace, follow the path toward the Grand Lift of Rold stairway
The Black Blade Kindred alternates fast twinblade combos with heavy, wide greataxe swings — respect the axe's reach even though it's a single enemy
A shield with strong holy/physical negation, or ranged spacing, helps avoid being caught between its two movesets at once
Defeating it nets both Gargoyle's Black Blades and Gargoyle's Black Axe plus a large rune reward — no remembrance step needed
lore: These Gargoyle-kin enforcers model themselves after Maliketh, the Black Blade — corpse-wax-mended twinblades marked with holy power standing in for the death-affinity their master carries, as if honor guards holding the line before the climb to the Mountaintops.

builds.name: Strength/Faith holy knight
builds.why: C-to-B Strength scaling with D Faith and fixed innate holy damage — dump levels into Strength for AR, meet the Faith requirement and stop
